# iproute_neighbor (Data Source)

Read neighbor/ARP entries.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read all neighbors
data "iproute_neighbor" "all" {}

# Read neighbors on a specific interface
data "iproute_neighbor" "eth0" {
  device = "eth0"
}

output "neighbors" {
  value = data.iproute_neighbor.all.neighbors
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `device` (String) Filter by interface.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `neighbors` (List of String) List of neighbor entries.
